title: Unique Pillowy Italian Apple Lasagna
description: A yeasty, pillowy Italian dish featuring apple juice and namul-blanch-seasoned ingredients, made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly principles in mind. This show-off dish is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and a pinch of salt, then gradually add apple juice and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a separate bowl, mix together namul, olive oil, and sugar.
Add sliced apples to the namul mixture and toss until they are evenly coated.
Roll out the risen dough to a large rectangle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Spread the apple-namul mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Roll the dough into a tight log, starting from one of the long edges.
Place the log in a baking dish, seam-side down, and bake for 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
